suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Verify the rust-library-worker skill artifact/path is consistently available to workers so procedure files can always be resolved when requested.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for dynamics-secondary reported the expected skill file path as missing, while handoff still reported followedProcedure=true. This suggests occasional skill-material availability drift rather than implementation failure.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document orientation keyword heuristics as a v1 approach in architecture documentation.
Skill procedure was followed correctly with comprehensive tests and naming conventions.
